title: Iran ‘struck’ high-value US radar systems in Gulf, show satellite images
summary_full: Iran has reportedly targeted key US radar and early warning systems across the Gulf, including advanced THAAD missile defense components in Jordan and Qatar, and a satellite communications hub in the UAE. These strikes, if confirmed, could significantly degrade American military surveillance and missile defense capabilities in West Asia, with substantial financial losses for the US.
